[index.html](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26323828/index.html)
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Ekanth B S — Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@300;400;500&family=Outfit:wght@200;300;400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root{
  --bg:#06080d;--bg2:#0b0e16;--border:rgba(255,255,255,.065);
  --accent:#00d4ff;--purple:#8b6eff;--orange:#ff6b35;
  --gold:#c9a84c;--green:#00e5a0;--rose:#ff4d7d;
  --text:#e9eef6;--muted:#68788c;--dim:#3a4d62;
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{
  background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);
  font-family:'Outfit',sans-serif;font-weight:300;
  overflow-x:hidden;cursor:none;
}

/* ── CUSTOM CURSOR ── */
#cursor{
  position:fixed;width:12px;height:12px;
  background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;
  pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  transition:width .2s,height .2s,background .2s;
  mix-blend-mode:difference;
}
#cursor-ring{
  position:fixed;width:36px;height:36px;
  border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.4);border-radius:50%;
  pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;
  transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  transition:all .12s ease;
}
body:hover #cursor{opacity:1}

/* ── CANVAS STARFIELD ── */
#starfield{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;}

/* ── PROGRESS BARS (2-way split) ── */
.progress-bar{
  position:fixed;z-index:1000;
  transition:width 0.1s ease-out, height 0.1s ease-out;
}
#progress-top{
  top:0;left:0;height:3px;width:0%;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--accent),var(--purple));
  box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(139,110,255,0.5);
}
#progress-right{
  top:0;right:0;width:3px;height:0%;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--purple),var(--rose));
  box-shadow: -2px 0 10px rgba(255,77,125,0.5);
}
#progress-bottom{
  bottom:0;left:0;height:3px;width:0%;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--green),var(--rose));
  box-shadow: 0 -2px 10px rgba(255,77,125,0.5);
}
#progress-left{
  top:0;left:0;width:3px;height:0%;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--accent),var(--green));
  box-shadow: 2px 0 10px rgba(0,229,160,0.5);
}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:500;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:20px 48px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(6,8,13,.95) 0%,transparent 100%);
  backdrop-filter:blur(2px);
  transition:background .3s;
}
nav.scrolled{background:rgba(6,8,13,.92);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.nav-logo{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.25em;color:var(--accent);
  text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;
}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:32px;}
.nav-links a{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--muted);text-decoration:none;
  transition:color .2s;
}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--accent);}

/* ── HERO ── */
#hero{
  position:relative;min-height:100vh;
  display:flex;align-items:center;
  overflow:hidden;z-index:1;
}
.hero-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  align-items:center;gap:80px;
  max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 48px;
  padding-top:80px;width:100%;
}
.hero-left{position:relative;}
.hero-eyebrow{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.3em;color:var(--accent);
  text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:20px;
  opacity:0;animation:slideInLeft .8s ease 1.1s forwards;
}
.hero-name{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:clamp(64px,8vw,96px);font-weight:300;
  line-height:.88;letter-spacing:-.03em;
  opacity:0;animation:slideInLeft .8s ease 1.25s forwards;
}
.hero-name .line2{
  font-style:italic;color:var(--muted);
  display:block;font-size:.6em;margin-top:8px;
}
.hero-tagline{
  font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.8;
  margin-top:28px;max-width:440px;
  opacity:0;animation:slideInLeft .8s ease 1.4s forwards;
}
.hero-tags{
  display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:28px;
  opacity:0;animation:slideInLeft .8s ease 1.55s forwards;
}
.htag{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:5px 12px;border-radius:2px;border:1px solid;
}
.htag-c{color:var(--accent); border-color:rgba(0,212,255,.25);background:rgba(0,212,255,.05);}
.htag-p{color:var(--purple);border-color:rgba(139,110,255,.25);background:rgba(139,110,255,.05);}
.htag-g{color:var(--green); border-color:rgba(0,229,160,.25); background:rgba(0,229,160,.05);}
.htag-o{color:var(--orange);border-color:rgba(255,107,53,.25); background:rgba(255,107,53,.05);}

.hero-right{
  position:relative;display:flex;justify-content:center;
  opacity:0;animation:shootingStar 1.1s cubic-bezier(0.15, 0.9, 0.25, 1) 0.1s forwards;
}
.profile-wrap{
  position:relative;
  width:340px;height:440px;
}
.profile-img{
  width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;
  border-radius:2px;
  filter:grayscale(10%) contrast(1.05);
  position:relative;z-index:2;
}
.profile-border{
  position:absolute;inset:-8px;
  border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.25);
  border-radius:4px;z-index:1;
}
.profile-glow{
  position:absolute;inset:-40px;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(0,212,255,.08) 0%,transparent 65%);
  z-index:0;
}
.profile-badge{
  position:absolute;bottom:-18px;right:-18px;
  background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:14px 18px;border-radius:4px;z-index:3;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  opacity:0;animation:badgePop .8s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275) 1.3s forwards;
}
.pb-num{font-size:28px;font-weight:500;color:var(--accent);line-height:1;}
.pb-label{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px;}

.profile-badge2{
  position:absolute;top:-18px;left:-18px;
  background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:12px 16px;border-radius:4px;z-index:3;
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  opacity:0;animation:badgePop .8s cubic-bezier(0.175, 0.885, 0.32, 1.275) 1.4s forwards;
}
.pb2-label{font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.15em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);}
.pb2-val{font-size:11px;color:var(--green);margin-top:2px;letter-spacing:.05em;}

/* scroll indicator */
.scroll-hint{
  position:absolute;bottom:32px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;
  letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--dim);text-transform:uppercase;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  opacity:0;animation:fadeIn 1s ease 2.2s forwards;
}
.scroll-line{width:1px;height:40px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,var(--accent));animation:scrollPulse 2s infinite;}

/* ── SECTION BASE ── */
.chapter{
  position:relative;z-index:1;
  max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;
  padding:120px 48px;
}
.chapter-header{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:20px;margin-bottom:64px;
}
.ch-num{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:11px;color:var(--dim);letter-spacing:.1em;
}
.ch-label{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:9px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.32em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);
}
.ch-line{flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--border);}
.ch-title{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:clamp(36px,5vw,56px);font-weight:300;
  line-height:1;margin-bottom:20px;
}
.ch-title em{font-style:italic;color:var(--muted);}

/* ── REVEAL ANIMATION ── */
.reveal{
  opacity:0;transform:translateY(40px);
  transition:opacity .8s ease,transform .8s ease;
}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}
.reveal-left{
  opacity:0;transform:translateX(-40px);
  transition:opacity .8s ease,transform .8s ease;
}
.reveal-left.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}
.reveal-right{
  opacity:0;transform:translateX(40px);
  transition:opacity .8s ease,transform .8s ease;
}
.reveal-right.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateX(0);}

/* delay classes */
.d1{transition-delay:.1s}.d2{transition-delay:.2s}.d3{transition-delay:.3s}
.d4{transition-delay:.4s}.d5{transition-delay:.5s}

/* ── EDUCATION ── */
.edu-timeline{position:relative;padding-left:30px;}
.edu-timeline::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;left:0;top:8px;bottom:0;
  width:1px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,var(--accent),transparent);
}
.edu-item{
  position:relative;margin-bottom:40px;padding-bottom:40px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.edu-item:last-child{border-bottom:none;margin-bottom:0;padding-bottom:0;}
.edu-item::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;left:-34px;top:8px;
  width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--accent);
}
.edu-school{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:24px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:4px;
}
.edu-meta{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.06em;margin-bottom:8px;
}
.edu-note{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:10px;color:var(--purple);letter-spacing:.05em;margin-top:6px;
}

/* ── BADGE ── */
.b-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-top:10px;}
.b{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:8.5px;
    letter-spacing:.13em;text-transform:uppercase;
    padding:3px 10px;border-radius:2px;border:1px solid;}
.bc{color:var(--accent); border-color:rgba(0,212,255,.25); background:rgba(0,212,255,.04);}
.bp{color:var(--purple); border-color:rgba(139,110,255,.25);background:rgba(139,110,255,.04);}
.bo{color:var(--orange); border-color:rgba(255,107,53,.25); background:rgba(255,107,53,.04);}
.bg{color:var(--gold);   border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.25); background:rgba(201,168,76,.04);}
.bn{color:var(--green);  border-color:rgba(0,229,160,.25);  background:rgba(0,229,160,.04);}
.br{color:var(--rose);   border-color:rgba(255,77,125,.25); background:rgba(255,77,125,.04);}

/* ── PROJECT STORY CARDS ── */
.story-block{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;
  gap:48px;align-items:center;margin-bottom:100px;
}
.story-block.flip{direction:rtl;}
.story-block.flip > *{direction:ltr;}

.story-img-wrap{
  position:relative;border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;
}
.story-img{
  width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;object-fit:cover;
  display:block;
  filter:contrast(1.05) saturate(.9);
  transition:transform .6s ease,filter .4s ease;
}
.story-img-wrap:hover .story-img{
  transform:scale(1.03);filter:contrast(1.1) saturate(1);
}
.story-img-border{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  pointer-events:none;border-radius:4px;
}
.img-glow{
  position:absolute;inset:-30px;
  border-radius:8px;
  pointer-events:none;z-index:-1;
  opacity:.4;
}

.story-content{}
.story-tag{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-bottom:16px;display:block;
}
.story-title{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,40px);font-weight:600;
  line-height:1.05;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:12px;
}
.story-sub{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;
  text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:16px;
}
.story-body{
  font-size:13.5px;color:var(--muted);
  line-height:1.85;font-weight:300;
}
.story-body strong{color:rgba(233,238,246,.88);font-weight:400;}
.story-status{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;
  padding:4px 11px;border-radius:2px;border:1px solid;
  display:inline-block;margin-bottom:16px;
}

/* ── ZIEN AGENCY GRID ── */
.agency-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;
  margin-top:48px;
}
.agency{
  background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:22px 24px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .25s,transform .25s;
}
.agency:hover{border-color:rgba(0,212,255,.2);transform:translateY(-3px);}
.agency::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;
  width:2px;height:100%;
}
.agency:nth-child(1)::before{background:var(--accent);}
.agency:nth-child(2)::before{background:var(--purple);}
.agency:nth-child(3)::before{background:var(--orange);}
.agency:nth-child(4)::before{background:var(--green);}
.agency:nth-child(5)::before{background:var(--gold);}
.agency:nth-child(6)::before{background:var(--rose);}
.agency-name{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:8px;
}
.agency-desc{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.6;}
.agency-tag{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  margin-top:8px;
}
.t-done{color:var(--green);}.t-prog{color:var(--gold);}.t-plan{color:var(--dim);}

/* ── ZIA SPECIAL SECTION ── */
.zia-section{
  position:relative;z-index:1;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(0,212,255,.03),rgba(139,110,255,.03));
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  overflow:hidden;
}
.zia-section::before{
  content:'ZIA';position:absolute;
  right:-60px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:280px;font-weight:600;
  color:rgba(0,212,255,.025);pointer-events:none;
  letter-spacing:-.05em;
}
.zia-logo{
  width:180px;height:auto;border-radius:50%;
  filter:drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(0,212,255,.4));
  animation:floatLogo 4s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.zia-terminal-img{
  width:100%;border-radius:4px;
  border:1px solid rgba(0,212,255,.2);
  box-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(0,212,255,.1);
}

/* ── SVG ILLUSTRATIONS (sections without photos) ── */
.illus-wrap{
  position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  aspect-ratio:16/9;background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;
}

/* ── SKILLS GRID ── */
.skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:2px;}
.skill{
  background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:20px 22px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;
  transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s;
}
.skill:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);border-color:rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.skill::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;
  width:2px;height:100%;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;
}
.skill:nth-child(1)::before{background:var(--accent);opacity:1;}
.skill:nth-child(2)::before{background:var(--rose);opacity:1;}
.skill:nth-child(3)::before{background:var(--purple);opacity:1;}
.skill:nth-child(4)::before{background:var(--orange);opacity:1;}
.skill:nth-child(5)::before{background:var(--green);opacity:1;}
.skill:nth-child(6)::before{background:var(--gold);opacity:1;}
.skill:nth-child(7)::before{background:var(--accent);opacity:1;}
.skill:nth-child(8)::before{background:var(--rose);opacity:1;}
.skill-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:500;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:7px;}
.skill-desc{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;font-weight:300;}

/* ── INTERESTS ── */
.interests{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;}
.itag{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9.5px;letter-spacing:.09em;
  padding:8px 16px;border-radius:2px;border:1px solid;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  transition:transform .2s,box-shadow .2s;cursor:default;
}
.itag:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.3);}

/* ── EXTRA GRID ── */
.extra-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;}
.extra{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:20px;transition:border-color .2s,transform .2s;}
.extra:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);border-color:rgba(0,212,255,.15);}
.extra-cat{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.22em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--accent);margin-bottom:10px;}
.extra-text{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);line-height:1.7;}
.extra-text strong{color:var(--text);font-weight:400;}

/* ── LANGUAGE GRID ── */
.lang-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;}
.lang{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:16px;text-align:center;transition:transform .2s;}
.lang:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);}
.lang-name{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-size:22px;font-weight:400;color:var(--text);margin-bottom:6px;}
.lang-level{font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--dim);}

/* ── CONTACT / FOOTER ── */
#contact{
  position:relative;z-index:1;
  text-align:center;padding:120px 48px 80px;
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);
}
.contact-big{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:clamp(48px,8vw,96px);font-weight:300;
  line-height:.9;margin-bottom:40px;
}
.contact-big em{font-style:italic;color:var(--muted);}
.contact-row{
  display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:40px;flex-wrap:wrap;
  margin-bottom:60px;
}
.c-link{
  font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;
  font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.08em;color:var(--muted);
  text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
}
.c-link:hover{color:var(--accent);}
.c-link-label{
  font-size:8.5px;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--dim);margin-right:4px;
}
.footer-sig{
  font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;
  font-size:13px;font-style:italic;color:var(--dim);
  margin-top:60px;
}

/* ── DIVIDER ── */
.divider{
  width:100%;height:1px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--border),transparent);
  margin:0;
}

/* ── KEYFRAMES ── */
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0}to{opacity:1}}
@keyframes scrollPulse{0%,100%{opacity:.3;transform:scaleY(.8)}50%{opacity:1;transform:scaleY(1)}}
@keyframes floatLogo{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0)}50%{transform:translateY(-12px)}}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.4}50%{opacity:1}}
@keyframes bgFloat{0%{transform:translate(0,0)}50%{transform:translate(30px,-20px)}100%{transform:translate(0,0)}}
@keyframes scanline{0%{top:-20%}100%{top:120%}}
@keyframes shootingStar {
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(60vh, -130vh) scale(0.5) rotate(25deg); filter: blur(30px) brightness(2.5); }
  60% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(-10px, 40px) scale(1.05) rotate(-3deg); filter: blur(5px) brightness(1.2); }
  80% { transform: translate(5px, -15px) scale(0.98) rotate(1deg); filter: blur(0) brightness(1); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1) rotate(0deg); filter: blur(0) brightness(1); }
}

/* ── AMBIENT BLOBS ── */
.blob{
  position:fixed;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(80px);
  pointer-events:none;z-index:0;
}
.blob1{
  width:500px;height:500px;top:-20%;left:-10%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(0,212,255,.07) 0%,transparent 70%);
  animation:bgFloat 15s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.blob2{
  width:400px;height:400px;bottom:-10%;right:-5%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(139,110,255,.09) 0%,transparent 70%);
  animation:bgFloat 18s ease-in-out infinite reverse;
}
.blob3{
  width:300px;height:300px;top:40%;left:40%;
  background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(255,107,53,.05) 0%,transparent 70%);
  animation:bgFloat 22s ease-in-out infinite;
}

/* ── NEW VISUAL EFFECTS ── */
.comet-trail {
  position: absolute; bottom: 50%; left: 50%;
  width: 4px; height: 150vh;
  background: linear-gradient(to top, var(--accent), var(--purple), transparent);
  transform: translateX(-50%); border-radius: 4px; filter: blur(2px);
  opacity: 0; animation: cometFade 1.1s cubic-bezier(0.15, 0.9, 0.25, 1) 0.1s forwards;
  z-index: 0; pointer-events: none;
}
@keyframes cometFade {
  0% { opacity: 0.9; height: 150vh; }
  60% { opacity: 0.8; height: 80vh; }
  80% { opacity: 0; height: 0; }
  100% { opacity: 0; height: 0; }
}

.landing-sparks {
  position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; width: 0; height: 0; z-index: 10;
}
.spark {
  position: absolute; width: 3px; height: 12px; background: var(--accent);
  border-radius: 2px; opacity: 0; box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--accent);
  transform-origin: bottom center;
  animation: sparkBurst 0.6s ease-out 1.1s forwards;
}
@keyframes sparkBurst {
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: rotate(var(--r)) translateY(0) scaleY(1); }
  10% { opacity: 1; }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: rotate(var(--r)) translateY(120px) scaleY(0.2); }
}

.flash-ring {
  position: absolute; inset: -8px; border: 2px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius: 4px; z-index: 4; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
  animation: flashPulse 1s ease-out 1.1s forwards;
}
@keyframes flashPulse {
  0% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); box-shadow: 0 0 20px var(--accent), inset 0 0 20px var(--accent); }
  100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(1.3); box-shadow: 0 0 0px var(--accent), inset 0 0 0px var(--accent); }
}

.orbit-ring {
  position: absolute; top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
  border-radius: 50%; border: 1px solid; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; opacity: 0;
  animation: orbitAppear 0.5s ease 1.2s forwards, orbitSpin var(--dur) linear infinite 1.2s;
}
.ring-cyan { width: 440px; height: 500px; border-color: rgba(0,212,255,.2); --dur: 12s; }
.ring-purple { width: 480px; height: 420px; border-color: rgba(139,110,255,.2); --dur: 15s; animation-direction: reverse; }
.ring-rose { width: 380px; height: 540px; border-color: rgba(255,77,125,.15); --dur: 18s; }

@keyframes orbitAppear { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }
@keyframes orbitSpin { from { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(0deg); } to { transform: translate(-50%, -50%) rotate(360deg); } }

@keyframes slideInLeft { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(-40px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } }
@keyframes badgePop {
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(0.5); }
  60% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.15); }
  80% { transform: scale(0.95); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
}

.click-ripple {
  position: fixed; border: 1px solid var(--accent); border-radius: 50%;
  pointer-events: none; transform: translate(-50%, -50%); z-index: 9999;
  animation: rippleOut 0.6s ease-out forwards;
}
@keyframes rippleOut { 0% { width: 0; height: 0; opacity: 0.8; } 100% { width: 80px; height: 80px; opacity: 0; } }

.skill-particle {
  position: absolute; width: 4px; height: 4px; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%;
  pointer-events: none; z-index: 10; animation: skillFloat 0.8s ease-out forwards;
}
@keyframes skillFloat { 0% { opacity: 1; transform: translate(0, 0) scale(1); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: translate(var(--tx), -30px) scale(0); } }

.section-spotlight {
  position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; width: 800px; height: 800px;
  background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(0,212,255,0.03) 0%, transparent 60%);
  transform: translate(-50%, -50%); pointer-events: none; z-index: 0; transition: top 0.6s ease-out, left 0.6s ease-out;
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- AMBIENT -->
<div class="blob blob1"></div>
<div class="blob blob2"></div>
<div class="blob blob3"></div>

<!-- CURSOR -->
<div id="cursor"></div>
<div id="cursor-ring"></div>

<!-- PROGRESS BARS -->
<div id="progress-top" class="progress-bar"></div>
<div id="progress-right" class="progress-bar"></div>
<div id="progress-bottom" class="progress-bar"></div>
<div id="progress-left" class="progress-bar"></div>

<!-- STAR CANVAS -->
<canvas id="starfield"></canvas>

<!-- SECTION SPOTLIGHT -->
<div class="section-spotlight" id="spotlight"></div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav id="navbar">
  <a class="nav-logo" href="#hero">// ekanth bs</a>
  <div class="nav-links">
    <a href="#education">Education</a>
    <a href="#ventures">Ventures</a>
    <a href="#zia">ZIA</a>
    <a href="#projects">Projects</a>
    <a href="#skills">Skills</a>
    <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
</nav>

<!-- ═══════════ HERO ═══════════ -->
<section id="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid">
    <div class="hero-left">
      <div class="hero-eyebrow">// founder · engineer · researcher · 2026</div>
      <div class="hero-name">
        Ekanth
        <span class="line2">B S</span>
      </div>
      <p class="hero-tagline">
        Founder of Zien Organisation. Building hardware for Indian agriculture, AI agents on Linux, Vedic astrology platforms, and next-gen aerospace concepts — all at once, at 17.
      </p>
      <div class="hero-tags">
        <span class="htag htag-c">PCME Student</span>
        <span class="htag htag-p">Entrepreneur</span>
        <span class="htag htag-g">Embedded Engineer</span>
        <span class="htag htag-o">AI Developer</span>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="hero-right">
      <div class="comet-trail"></div>
      <div class="landing-sparks">
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 0deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 20deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 40deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 60deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 80deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 100deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 120deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 140deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 160deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 180deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 200deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 220deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 240deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 260deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 280deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 300deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 320deg;"></div>
        <div class="spark" style="--r: 340deg;"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="profile-wrap">
        <div class="orbit-ring ring-cyan"></div>
        <div class="orbit-ring ring-purple"></div>
        <div class="orbit-ring ring-rose"></div>
        <div class="flash-ring"></div>
        <div class="profile-glow"></div>
        <div class="profile-border"></div>
        <img class="profile-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Ekanth B S">
        <div class="profile-badge">
          <div class="pb-num">6+</div>
          <div class="pb-label">Active Projects</div>
        </div>
        <div class="profile-badge2">
          <div class="pb2-label">Location</div>
          <div class="pb2-val">Bangalore · Karnataka</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
    <span>scroll</span>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ═══════════ EDUCATION ═══════════ -->
<section id="education">
<div class="chapter">
  <div class="chapter-header reveal">
    <span class="ch-num">01</span>
    <div class="ch-line"></div>
    <span class="ch-label">Education</span>
  </div>
  <div class="ch-title reveal d1">
    The <em>Foundation</em>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:64px;align-items:start;">
    <div class="edu-timeline">
      <div class="edu-item reveal d1">
        <div class="edu-school">Christ PU Residential College</div>
        <div class="edu-meta">Pre-University · PCME · 2024–2026 · Kumbalagodu, Bangalore</div>
        <div class="b-row">
          <span class="b bc">JEE Mains</span><span class="b bp">BITSAT</span>
          <span class="b bo">KCET</span><span class="b bg">UGEE</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="edu-item reveal d2">
        <div class="edu-school">Bethany Central School</div>
        <div class="edu-meta">ICSE · Class 10 · Completed 2024 · Arsikere, Karnataka</div>
        <div class="edu-note">▸ Regional-level Badminton representative</div>
      </div>
      <div class="edu-item reveal d3">
        <div class="edu-school">St. Mary's Higher Primary</div>
        <div class="edu-meta">English Medium · Arsikere, Karnataka</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SVG Education Illustration -->
    <div class="reveal d2">
      <div class="illus-wrap" style="aspect-ratio:4/3;">
        <svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 480 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
          <defs>
            <linearGradient id="eduGrad" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="100%" y2="100%">
              <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00d4ff" stop-opacity="0.15"/>
              <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8b6eff" stop-opacity="0.05"/>
            </linearGradient>
          </defs>
          <rect width="480" height="360" fill="url(#eduGrad)"/>
          <!-- Grid lines -->
          <line x1="0" y1="60" x2="480" y2="60" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.04)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="180" x2="480" y2="180" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.04)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="300" x2="480" y2="300" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.04)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="120" y1="0" x2="120" y2="360" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.04)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="240" y1="0" x2="240" y2="360" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.04)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="360" y1="0" x2="360" y2="360" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.04)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <!-- Timeline line -->
          <line x1="60" y1="60" x2="60" y2="300" stroke="#00d4ff" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.4"/>
          <!-- Dots -->
          <circle cx="60" cy="90" r="5" fill="#00d4ff">
            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </circle>
          <circle cx="60" cy="180" r="5" fill="#8b6eff">
            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2.4s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </circle>
          <circle cx="60" cy="270" r="5" fill="#ff6b35">
            <animate attributeName="r" values="5;7;5" dur="2.8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </circle>
          <!-- Labels -->
          <text x="80" y="86" fill="#e9eef6" font-size="13" font-family="serif" font-style="italic">Christ PU Residential College</text>
          <text x="80" y="102" fill="#68788c" font-size="10" font-family="monospace">PCME · 2024–2026</text>
          <text x="80" y="176" fill="#e9eef6" font-size="13" font-family="serif" font-style="italic">Bethany Central School</text>
          <text x="80" y="192" fill="#68788c" font-size="10" font-family="monospace">ICSE · 2024</text>
          <text x="80" y="266" fill="#e9eef6" font-size="13" font-family="serif" font-style="italic">St. Mary's Higher Primary</text>
          <text x="80" y="282" fill="#68788c" font-size="10" font-family="monospace">Arsikere</text>
          <!-- Exam badges -->
          <rect x="80" y="112" width="55" height="16" rx="2" fill="rgba(0,212,255,.06)" stroke="rgba(0,212,255,.3)" stroke-width=".5"/>
          <text x="107" y="124" fill="#00d4ff" font-size="8" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle">JEE MAINS</text>
          <rect x="140" y="112" width="50" height="16" rx="2" fill="rgba(139,110,255,.06)" stroke="rgba(139,110,255,.3)" stroke-width=".5"/>
          <text x="165" y="124" fill="#8b6eff" font-size="8" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle">BITSAT</text>
          <rect x="195" y="112" width="40" height="16" rx="2" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.06)" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.3)" stroke-width=".5"/>
          <text x="215" y="124" fill="#ff6b35" font-size="8" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle">KCET</text>
          <!-- Corner label -->
          <text x="420" y="340" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.08)" font-size="9" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle">EDUCATION PATH</text>
        </svg>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══════════ ZIEN VENTURES ═══════════ -->
<section id="ventures">
<div class="chapter">
  <div class="chapter-header reveal">
    <span class="ch-num">02</span>
    <div class="ch-line"></div>
    <span class="ch-label">Entrepreneurship</span>
  </div>

  <div style="max-width:700px;margin-bottom:64px;">
    <div class="ch-title reveal">
      Zien <em>Organisation</em>
    </div>
    <p class="story-body reveal d1" style="font-size:14px;line-height:1.9;">
      Founded in <strong>2025</strong> — an invite-only umbrella brand built on deliberate exclusivity and a dark, sharp aesthetic. Multiple independent divisions spanning aerospace, technology, travel, and education. Core identity, branding, and membership framework are complete. Each division runs its own mission, under one name.
    </p>
  </div>

  <!-- SVG Zien Brand Banner -->
  <div class="reveal" style="margin-bottom:48px;">
    <div class="illus-wrap" style="aspect-ratio:21/6;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#06080d,#0b0e16);">
      <svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 1200 343" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
        <defs>
          <linearGradient id="zienGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
            <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#00d4ff" stop-opacity=".7"/>
            <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#8b6eff" stop-opacity=".7"/>
          </linearGradient>
          <filter id="glow">
            <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/>
            <feComposite in="SourceGraphic" in2="blur" operator="over"/>
          </filter>
        </defs>
        <!-- Background grid -->
        <pattern id="grid" width="40" height="40" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
          <path d="M 40 0 L 0 0 0 40" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.03)" stroke-width="1"/>
        </pattern>
        <rect width="1200" height="343" fill="url(#grid)"/>
        <!-- Diagonal accent -->
        <line x1="0" y1="343" x2="400" y2="0" stroke="rgba(0,212,255,.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
        <line x1="800" y1="343" x2="1200" y2="0" stroke="rgba(139,110,255,.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
        <!-- ZIEN big text -->
        <text x="600" y="220" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.04)" font-size="220" font-family="serif" font-weight="600" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="-10">ZIEN</text>
        <!-- Tagline -->
        <text x="600" y="268" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.2)" font-size="11" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="8">ORGANISATION · FOUNDED 2025 · INVITE ONLY</text>
        <!-- Accent line -->
        <line x1="200" y1="280" x2="1000" y2="280" stroke="url(#zienGrad)" stroke-width=".5" opacity=".4"/>
        <!-- Corner marks -->
        <path d="M20,20 L60,20 L60,24 M20,20 L20,60 L24,60" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,212,255,.3)" stroke-width="1"/>
        <path d="M1180,20 L1140,20 L1140,24 M1180,20 L1180,60 L1176,60" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,212,255,.3)" stroke-width="1"/>
        <path d="M20,323 L60,323 L60,319 M20,323 L20,283 L24,283" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,212,255,.3)" stroke-width="1"/>
        <path d="M1180,323 L1140,323 L1140,319 M1180,323 L1180,283 L1176,283" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,212,255,.3)" stroke-width="1"/>
      </svg>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="agency-grid reveal d1">
    <div class="agency">
      <div class="agency-name">Zien Aerospace Ltd.</div>
      <div class="agency-desc">Defence aerospace, 6G fighter concepts, hypersonic R&D, and advanced energy systems.</div>
      <div class="agency-tag t-prog">▸ Framework stage</div>
    </div>
    <div class="agency">
      <div class="agency-name">Zien Technologies</div>
      <div class="agency-desc">Electronics fabrication, embedded systems R&D, and engineering product services.</div>
      <div class="agency-tag t-prog">▸ Partially built</div>
    </div>
    <div class="agency">
      <div class="agency-name">Zien Holidays</div>
      <div class="agency-desc">Premium curated travel — Dubai–Abu Dhabi, Colombo, pilgrimage packages.</div>
      <div class="agency-tag t-done">▸ Operational</div>
    </div>
    <div class="agency">
      <div class="agency-name">ZITS</div>
      <div class="agency-desc">Zien Institute of Technology & Science — future academic and research arm.</div>
      <div class="agency-tag t-plan">▸ Planned</div>
    </div>
    <div class="agency">
      <div class="agency-name">Brand & Identity</div>
      <div class="agency-desc">Skull + Z-sword logo, internal hierarchy, dark web presence, invite-only framing.</div>
      <div class="agency-tag t-done">▸ Completed</div>
    </div>
    <div class="agency">
      <div class="agency-name">Membership System</div>
      <div class="agency-desc">Tiered invite-only structure with documented hierarchy and onboarding.</div>
      <div class="agency-tag t-prog">▸ Partially built</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══════════ ZIA SECTION ═══════════ -->
<section id="zia" class="zia-section">
<div class="chapter">
  <div class="chapter-header reveal">
    <span class="ch-num">03</span>
    <div class="ch-line"></div>
    <span class="ch-label">AI Agent System</span>
  </div>

  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:auto 1fr;gap:80px;align-items:center;">
    <div class="reveal reveal-left" style="text-align:center;">
      <img class="zia-logo" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="ZIA Logo">
      <div style="margin-top:20px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.2em;color:var(--accent);text-transform:uppercase;">Zien Intelligent Assistant</div>
      <div style="font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:9px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:4px;letter-spacing:.1em;">zien.org</div>
    </div>
    <div class="reveal reveal-right">
      <div class="ch-title" style="font-size:clamp(32px,4vw,52px);">
        ZIA <em>v3</em>
      </div>
      <p class="story-body" style="margin-bottom:24px;">
        Built and deployed a full <strong>AI agent command center running on Kali Linux</strong> — ZIA (Zien Intelligent Assistant) v3. The system integrates <strong>Ollama with LLaMA 3.2 as a local offline LLM</strong>, DuckDuckGo real-time web search, live CPU/memory/network monitoring, and a suite of quick-ops for cybersecurity tasks (CVE lookups, Kali news, exploit DB, recon tools, NMAP, privilege escalation checks, bash toolkit, Python security, and system hardening). A full terminal UI built in Python running on Linux 6.1 kali-amd64. This is a daily-use tool — not a demo.
      </p>
      <div class="b-row">
        <span class="b bc">Ollama · LLaMA 3.2</span>
        <span class="b bp">Kali Linux · Python 3.13</span>
        <span class="b bo">Real-Time Web Intel</span>
        <span class="b bg">Local · Offline · Private</span>
        <span class="b bn">Zien Command Center</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="reveal" style="margin-top:56px;">
    <img class="zia-terminal-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="ZIA v3 Terminal">
  </div>
</div>
</section>

<div class="divider"></div>

<!-- ═══════════ PROJECTS ═══════════ -->
<section id="projects">
<div class="chapter">
  <div class="chapter-header reveal">
    <span class="ch-num">04</span>
    <div class="ch-line"></div>
    <span class="ch-label">Projects</span>
  </div>

  <!-- JYOTISHA AI -->
  <div class="story-block">
    <div class="story-img-wrap reveal reveal-left">
      <div class="img-glow" style="background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(255,77,125,.15),transparent);"></div>
      <div class="illus-wrap" style="aspect-ratio:16/9;background:#0b0e16;">
        <svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 640 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
          <defs>
            <radialGradient id="starBg" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
              <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#1a1005" stop-opacity="1"/>
              <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#06080d" stop-opacity="1"/>
            </radialGradient>
          </defs>
          <rect width="640" height="360" fill="url(#starBg)"/>
          <!-- Stars -->
          <circle cx="40" cy="30" r="1" fill="#c9a84c" opacity=".8"><animate attributeName="opacity" values=".8;.2;.8" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></circle>
          <circle cx="120" cy="80" r="1.2" fill="#c9a84c" opacity=".6"><animate attributeName="opacity" values=".6;1;.6" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></circle>
          <circle cx="580" cy="40" r="1" fill="#c9a84c" opacity=".9"><animate attributeName="opacity" values=".9;.3;.9" dur="1.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></circle>
          <circle cx="500" cy="90" r="1.3" fill="#c9a84c" opacity=".5"><animate attributeName="opacity" values=".5;1;.5" dur="2.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></circle>
          <circle cx="200" cy="40" r="1" fill="white" opacity=".4"/>
          <circle cx="380" cy="20" r="1.5" fill="white" opacity=".3"/>
          <circle cx="600" cy="150" r="1" fill="white" opacity=".5"/>
          <circle cx="60" cy="200" r="1" fill="white" opacity=".4"/>
          <circle cx="620" cy="280" r="1" fill="white" opacity=".3"/>
          <circle cx="30" cy="320" r="1.2" fill="#c9a84c" opacity=".6"/>
          <!-- Kundali chart -->
          <g transform="translate(320,180)">
            <rect x="-100" y="-100" width="200" height="200" fill="none" stroke="rgba(201,168,76,.4)" stroke-width="1"/>
            <line x1="-100" y1="-100" x2="100" y2="100" stroke="rgba(201,168,76,.2)" stroke-width=".5"/>
            <line x1="100" y1="-100" x2="-100" y2="100" stroke="rgba(201,168,76,.2)" stroke-width=".5"/>
            <line x1="-100" y1="0" x2="100" y2="0" stroke="rgba(201,168,76,.2)" stroke-width=".5"/>
            <line x1="0" y1="-100" x2="0" y2="100" stroke="rgba(201,168,76,.2)" stroke-width=".5"/>
            <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="3" fill="#c9a84c"><animate attributeName="r" values="3;5;3" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/></circle>
            <!-- Planet dots -->
            <circle cx="60" cy="-40" r="3" fill="#ff6b35"/>
            <circle cx="-50" cy="60" r="3" fill="#8b6eff"/>
            <circle cx="30" cy="70" r="2.5" fill="#00d4ff"/>
            <circle cx="-70" cy="-30" r="2" fill="#00e5a0"/>
            <!-- Labels -->
            <text x="65" y="-35" fill="#ff6b35" font-size="8" font-family="monospace">☉</text>
            <text x="-58" y="65" fill="#8b6eff" font-size="8" font-family="monospace">☽</text>
            <text x="35" y="78" fill="#00d4ff" font-size="8" font-family="monospace">♃</text>
          </g>
          <!-- Title overlay -->
          <text x="320" y="330" fill="rgba(201,168,76,.5)" font-size="11" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="4">JYOTISHA AI · VEDIC HOROSCOPE</text>
          <!-- OM symbol -->
          <text x="320" y="50" fill="rgba(201,168,76,.15)" font-size="60" text-anchor="middle">ॐ</text>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="story-img-border"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="story-content reveal reveal-right">
      <span class="story-tag" style="color:var(--rose);">// Shipped · AI Web App</span>
      <div class="story-status" style="color:var(--green);border-color:rgba(0,229,160,.3);background:rgba(0,229,160,.06);">Live</div>
      <div class="story-title">Jyotisha AI</div>
      <div class="story-sub">Vedic Horoscope · All Indian Regional Languages · Zero Backend</div>
      <div class="story-body">
        A complete AI-powered Vedic astrology platform. Computes <strong>Lagna, Navagraha positions, 12 houses, Nakshatra, Vimshottari Dasha, Yogas & Doshas</strong> using real astronomical algorithms. Feeds chart data into the <strong>Anthropic Claude API</strong> for personalised flowing-prose readings — streamed live with typewriter effect. Renders <strong>Rashi and Navamsa Kundali SVG charts</strong>, planet strength table, and Dasha timeline. Supports all Indian regional languages. Zero backend, single HTML file.
      </div>
      <div class="b-row" style="margin-top:16px;">
        <span class="b bc">Anthropic API</span>
        <span class="b bp">Vedic Algorithms</span>
        <span class="b bo">SVG Charts</span>
        <span class="b bg">All Indian Languages</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- FARMER DEVICE -->
  <div class="story-block flip">
    <div class="story-img-wrap reveal reveal-right">
      <div class="img-glow" style="background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(0,229,160,.12),transparent);"></div>
      <img class="story-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Ultrasonic Flow Meter">
      <div class="story-img-border"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="story-content reveal reveal-left">
      <span class="story-tag" style="color:var(--green);">// In Development · Hardware</span>
      <div class="story-status" style="color:var(--gold);border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.3);background:rgba(201,168,76,.06);">In Progress</div>
      <div class="story-title">Farm Water Monitor</div>
      <div class="story-sub">Ultrasonic Doppler · Analog Front-End · Kali Linux Logging</div>
      <div class="story-body">
        <strong>Approach ①:</strong> Piezoelectric Tx/Rx transducers clamped onto UPVC pipe. A 1 MHz oscillator drives the Tx; the received signal passes through a <strong>differential amplifier → mixer & filter → low-pass filter</strong> to extract the Doppler shift. ESP32 computes flow velocity and cumulative volume, logs all data over serial to Kali Linux in real time.
      </div>
      <div class="b-row" style="margin-top:16px;">
        <span class="b bc">ESP32</span><span class="b bp">Ultrasonic Doppler</span>
        <span class="b bo">1MHz OSC</span><span class="b bg">Analog Front-End</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="story-block">
    <div class="story-img-wrap reveal reveal-left">
      <div class="img-glow" style="background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(0,229,160,.1),transparent);"></div>
      <img class="story-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Turbine Flow Meter">
      <div class="story-img-border"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="story-content reveal reveal-right">
      <span class="story-tag" style="color:var(--green);">// In Development · Hardware · IP65</span>
      <div class="story-status" style="color:var(--gold);border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.3);background:rgba(201,168,76,.06);">In Progress</div>
      <div class="story-title">Farm Water Monitor</div>
      <div class="story-sub">Turbine Hall-Effect · LCD Display · IP65 Field Enclosure</div>
      <div class="story-body">
        <strong>Approach ②:</strong> A <strong>spinning turbine impeller</strong> inside a transparent inline PVC connector. A hall-effect sensor counts each revolution — pulse frequency maps to flow rate; integrated over time gives total volume in litres. Real-time output on a <strong>16×2 LCD</strong>. Housed in an <strong>IP65 weatherproof enclosure</strong> for direct outdoor deployment in agricultural fields.
      </div>
      <div class="b-row" style="margin-top:16px;">
        <span class="b bc">Arduino</span><span class="b bp">Hall Effect Sensor</span>
        <span class="b bo">16×2 LCD</span><span class="b bn">IP65 Enclosure</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- THORIUM -->
  <div class="story-block flip">
    <div class="story-img-wrap reveal reveal-right">
      <div class="img-glow" style="background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(139,110,255,.15),transparent);"></div>
      <div class="illus-wrap" style="aspect-ratio:16/9;background:#0b0e16;">
        <svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 640 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
          <rect width="640" height="360" fill="#06080d"/>
          <!-- Atom ring 1 -->
          <ellipse cx="320" cy="180" rx="140" ry="60" fill="none" stroke="rgba(139,110,255,.3)" stroke-width="1">
            <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="rotate" from="0 320 180" to="360 320 180" dur="8s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </ellipse>
          <!-- Atom ring 2 -->
          <ellipse cx="320" cy="180" rx="140" ry="60" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,212,255,.2)" stroke-width="1" transform="rotate(60,320,180)">
            <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="rotate" from="60 320 180" to="420 320 180" dur="12s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </ellipse>
          <!-- Atom ring 3 -->
          <ellipse cx="320" cy="180" rx="140" ry="60" fill="none" stroke="rgba(0,229,160,.15)" stroke-width="1" transform="rotate(120,320,180)">
            <animateTransform attributeName="transform" type="rotate" from="120 320 180" to="480 320 180" dur="10s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </ellipse>
          <!-- Nucleus -->
          <circle cx="320" cy="180" r="20" fill="rgba(139,110,255,.2)" stroke="rgba(139,110,255,.5)" stroke-width="1">
            <animate attributeName="r" values="20;24;20" dur="3s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
          </circle>
          <circle cx="320" cy="180" r="8" fill="#8b6eff" opacity=".8"/>
          <!-- Th label -->
          <text x="320" y="185" fill="white" font-size="10" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle" dominant-baseline="middle">Th</text>
          <!-- Electrons -->
          <circle r="4" fill="#00d4ff">
            <animateMotion dur="8s" repeatCount="indefinite">
              <mpath href="#orbit1"/>
            </animateMotion>
          </circle>
          <path id="orbit1" d="M320,180 m-140,0 a140,60 0 1,0 280,0 a140,60 0 1,0 -280,0" fill="none"/>
          <!-- Labels -->
          <text x="320" y="320" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.2)" font-size="11" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="3">Th-232 MOLTEN SALT REACTOR</text>
          <text x="320" y="35" fill="rgba(139,110,255,.4)" font-size="9" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="2">Th-232 → Pa-233 → U-233 BREEDING CYCLE</text>
        </svg>
      </div>
      <div class="story-img-border"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="story-content reveal reveal-left">
      <span class="story-tag" style="color:var(--purple);">// Independent Research · Nuclear Physics</span>
      <div class="story-status" style="color:var(--accent);border-color:rgba(0,212,255,.3);background:rgba(0,212,255,.06);">Ongoing Study</div>
      <div class="story-title">Thorium Reactor Research</div>
      <div class="story-sub">Molten Salt Reactors · India's Three-Stage Programme</div>
      <div class="story-body">
        Self-directed research into <strong>Thorium-232 based Molten Salt Reactors</strong> — studying the <strong>Th-232 → Pa-233 → U-233 breeding cycle</strong>, reactor criticality, fluoride salt coolant chemistry, and neutron economy. India holds vast Thorium deposits, making this a strategically critical technology. Long-term goal: channel this into the <strong>advanced energy division of Zien Aerospace Limited</strong>.
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- FIGHTER JETS -->
  <div class="story-block">
    <div class="story-img-wrap reveal reveal-left">
      <div class="img-glow" style="background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(255,107,53,.12),transparent);"></div>
      <div class="illus-wrap" style="aspect-ratio:16/9;background:#06080d;">
        <svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 640 360" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
          <rect width="640" height="360" fill="linear-gradient(180deg,#06080d,#0b0e16)"/>
          <!-- Stars/speed lines -->
          <line x1="0" y1="100" x2="200" y2="100" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.08)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="180" x2="150" y2="180" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="0" y1="250" x2="180" y2="250" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.05)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="640" y1="100" x2="450" y2="100" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.08)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <line x1="640" y1="180" x2="480" y2="180" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.06)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <!-- Fighter jet silhouette (simplified) -->
          <g transform="translate(320,180) scale(1.8)">
            <!-- Body -->
            <path d="M0,-15 L80,0 L0,8 L-20,5 Z" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.15)" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.4)" stroke-width=".5"/>
            <!-- Wings -->
            <path d="M20,0 L50,30 L10,8 Z" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.1)" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.3)" stroke-width=".5"/>
            <path d="M20,0 L50,-30 L10,-8 Z" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.1)" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.3)" stroke-width=".5"/>
            <!-- Tail -->
            <path d="M-10,0 L-25,15 L-15,3 Z" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.08)" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.2)" stroke-width=".5"/>
            <path d="M-10,0 L-25,-15 L-15,-3 Z" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.08)" stroke="rgba(255,107,53,.2)" stroke-width=".5"/>
            <!-- Engine glow -->
            <circle cx="-22" cy="0" r="4" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.3)">
              <animate attributeName="r" values="4;6;4" dur="1.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
              <animate attributeName="fill-opacity" values=".3;.6;.3" dur="1.5s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>
            </circle>
          </g>
          <!-- Grid -->
          <line x1="0" y1="280" x2="640" y2="280" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,.04)" stroke-width="1"/>
          <!-- Labels -->
          <text x="320" y="320" fill="rgba(255,255,255,.15)" font-size="10" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="3">6TH GEN FIGHTER · AMCA · GCAP · NGAD</text>
          <text x="80" y="50" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.3)" font-size="8" font-family="monospace">STEALTH</text>
          <text x="80" y="65" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.3)" font-size="8" font-family="monospace">HYPERSONIC</text>
          <text x="80" y="80" fill="rgba(255,107,53,.3)" font-size="8" font-family="monospace">AI AVIONICS</text>
          <text x="520" y="50" fill="rgba(0,212,255,.3)" font-size="8" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="end">DIRECTED ENERGY</text>
          <text x="520" y="65" fill="rgba(0,212,255,.3)" font-size="8" font-family="monospace" text-anchor="end">SENSOR FUSION</text>

      <div class="story-title">6th-Gen Fighter Aircraft</div>
      <div class="story-sub">AMCA · GCAP · NGAD · Hypersonic Propulsion</div>
      <div class="story-body">
        Deep interest in <strong>6th-generation fighter development</strong> — stealth shaping, directed-energy weapons, AI-assisted sensor fusion, hypersonic propulsion (scramjets, combined-cycle engines), and advanced composite airframes. Follows India's <strong>AMCA</strong>, the trilateral <strong>GCAP</strong> (UK/Japan/Italy), and the US <strong>NGAD</strong>. Long-term vision through <strong>Zien Aerospace Limited</strong>: contribute to India's indigenous advanced aviation sector.
      </div>
    </div>

</div>
</section>

<script>
// ── COSMIC FLOW ──
(function(){
  const c=document.getElementById('starfield');
  const ctx=c.getContext('2d');
  let W,H,particles=[];
  let time = 0;
  
  function noise(x, y) {
    return Math.sin(x * 0.005 + time) * Math.cos(y * 0.005 - time);
  }

  function resize(){W=c.width=window.innerWidth;H=c.height=window.innerHeight;}
  function init(){
    particles=[];
    for(let i=0;i<250;i++){
      particles.push({
        x:Math.random()*W,
        y:Math.random()*H,
        vx:Math.random() - 0.5, 
        vy:Math.random() - 0.5,
        r:Math.random()*1.5+.3,
        baseAlpha:Math.random()*.5+.2,
        color: Math.random() > 0.85 ? '139,110,255' : (Math.random() > 0.7 ? '0,212,255' : '233,238,246'),
        flicker:Math.random()*Math.PI*2,
        speed: Math.random()* 1.5 + 0.5,
        tailMin: Math.random()*3+2
      });
    }
  }
  function draw(){
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
    time += 0.0015;
    
    particles.forEach(p=>{
      p.flicker+=.02;
      const angle = noise(p.x, p.y) * Math.PI * 2;
      
      p.vx += Math.cos(angle) * 0.05;
      p.vy += Math.sin(angle) * 0.05;
      
      const currentSpeed = Math.sqrt(p.vx*p.vx + p.vy*p.vy);
      if(currentSpeed > p.speed) {
        p.vx = (p.vx / currentSpeed) * p.speed;
        p.vy = (p.vy / currentSpeed) * p.speed;
      }
      
      p.x += p.vx - 0.5; 
      p.y += p.vy - 0.5; 
      
      if(p.x < -20) p.x = W+20;
      if(p.x > W+20) p.x = -20;
      if(p.y < -20) p.y = H+20;
      if(p.y > H+20) p.y = -20;

      const alpha = p.baseAlpha + Math.sin(p.flicker)*0.25;
      
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.moveTo(p.x, p.y);
      ctx.lineTo(p.x - p.vx * p.tailMin - 1, p.y - p.vy * p.tailMin - 1);
      ctx.strokeStyle = `rgba(${p.color},${Math.max(0,Math.min(1,alpha * 0.4))})`;
      ctx.lineWidth = p.r * 1.5;
      ctx.lineCap = "round";
      ctx.stroke();

      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.r, 0, Math.PI*2);
      ctx.fillStyle = `rgba(${p.color},${Math.max(0,Math.min(1,alpha))})`;
      ctx.fill();
    });
    requestAnimationFrame(draw);
  }
  window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{resize();init();});
  resize();init();draw();
})();

// ── CURSOR ──
const cur=document.getElementById('cursor');
const curR=document.getElementById('cursor-ring');
let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY;cur.style.left=mx+'px';cur.style.top=my+'px';});
(function animCur(){
  rx+=(mx-rx)*.15;ry+=(my-ry)*.15;
  curR.style.left=rx+'px';curR.style.top=ry+'px';
  requestAnimationFrame(animCur);
})();
document.querySelectorAll('a,button,.pcard,.agency,.skill,.itag').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{cur.style.width='20px';cur.style.height='20px';curR.style.width='52px';curR.style.height='52px';curR.style.borderColor='rgba(0,212,255,.6)';});
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{cur.style.width='12px';cur.style.height='12px';curR.style.width='36px';curR.style.height='36px';curR.style.borderColor='rgba(0,212,255,.4)';});
});

// ── SCROLL PROGRESS (2 sides splitting from top-left to bottom-right) ──
const pTop=document.getElementById('progress-top');
const pRight=document.getElementById('progress-right');
const pBottom=document.getElementById('progress-bottom');
const pLeft=document.getElementById('progress-left');
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>{
  const s=window.scrollY;
  const h=document.body.scrollHeight-window.innerHeight;
  const pct=h>0 ? Math.min(s/h,1) : 0; // 0 → 1
  const total=pct*2;                   // 0 → 2 (one unit per edge)

  // Top & Right (Bar 1)
  pTop.style.width=Math.min(total,1)*100+'%';
  pRight.style.height=Math.max(0,Math.min(total-1,1))*100+'%';

  // Left & Bottom (Bar 2)
  pLeft.style.height=Math.min(total,1)*100+'%';
  pBottom.style.width=Math.max(0,Math.min(total-1,1))*100+'%';

  const nav=document.getElementById('navbar');
  nav.classList.toggle('scrolled',s>60);
});

// ── REVEAL ON SCROLL ──
const revEls=document.querySelectorAll('.reveal,.reveal-left,.reveal-right');
const obs=new IntersectionObserver((entries)=>{
  entries.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('visible');obs.unobserve(e.target);}});
},{threshold:.08,rootMargin:'0px 0px -40px 0px'});
revEls.forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));

// ── SECTION SPOTLIGHT ──
const spotlight = document.getElementById('spotlight');
document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
  if (spotlight) {
    spotlight.style.left = e.pageX + 'px';
    spotlight.style.top = e.pageY + 'px';
  }
});

// ── MAGNETIC HOVER (CARDS) ──
document.querySelectorAll('.pcard, .agency').forEach(card => {
  card.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
    const rect = card.getBoundingClientRect();
    const x = e.clientX - rect.left;
    const y = e.clientY - rect.top;
    const centerX = rect.width / 2;
    const centerY = rect.height / 2;
    const rotateX = ((y - centerY) / centerY) * -5;
    const rotateY = ((x - centerX) / centerX) * 5;
    
    card.style.transform = `perspective(1000px) rotateX(${rotateX}deg) rotateY(${rotateY}deg) scale3d(1.02, 1.02, 1.02)`;
    card.style.transition = 'transform 0.1s ease';
  });
  
  card.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
    card.style.transform = 'perspective(1000px) rotateX(0) rotateY(0) scale3d(1, 1, 1)';
    card.style.transition = 'transform 0.5s ease';
  });
});

// ── CLICK RIPPLES ──
document.addEventListener('click', e => {
  const ripple = document.createElement('div');
  ripple.className = 'click-ripple';
  ripple.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
  ripple.style.top = e.clientY + 'px';
  document.body.appendChild(ripple);
  setTimeout(() => ripple.remove(), 600);
});

// ── SKILL PARTICLE BURSTS ──
document.querySelectorAll('.skill, .itag').forEach(skill => {
  skill.addEventListener('click', e => {
    for (let i = 0; i < 6; i++) {
      const p = document.createElement('div');
      p.className = 'skill-particle';
      p.style.left = e.clientX + 'px';
      p.style.top = e.clientY + 'px';
      p.style.setProperty('--tx', (Math.random() - 0.5) * 60 + 'px');
      document.body.appendChild(p);
      setTimeout(() => p.remove(), 800);
    }
  });
});
</script>
</body>
</html>
